snippets.name: CDC Synchronizer
snippets.description: Multi-stage flip-flop synchronizer for safely crossing an asynchronous signal into a destination clock domain.

NamingOptions.description:
Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

convention.description: Identifier case convention for ports and internal signals. 'snake' keeps canonical lower_snake_case names; 'camel' converts to lowerCamelCase.
convention.title: Convention

prefix.description: Literal string prepended to every rendered signal/port name (for example 'i_'/'o_' port-prefix styles). Empty for no prefix.
prefix.title: Prefix

suffix.description: Literal string appended to every rendered signal/port name. Empty for no suffix. The active-low '_n' suffix is applied automatically and is independent of this option.
suffix.title: Suffix

NamingOptions.title: NamingOptions

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the CDC synchronizer snippet.

Extends :class:`ClockedOptions` (language, reset, wrapper, comments,
naming). Reset is conditional here: when ``use_reset`` is false, the
inherited ``reset_style``/``reset_polarity`` fields are accepted (so the
common schema stays uniform) but are ignored — the generated register
chain has no reset input or logic at all.

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

reset_style.description: Reset timing. 'sync' samples reset on the clock edge; 'async' adds the reset edge to the sensitivity list for immediate reset.
reset_style.title: Reset Style

reset_polarity.description: Reset assertion level. 'active_low' resets when the reset input is 0 (named rst_n); 'active_high' resets when it is 1 (named rst).
reset_polarity.title: Reset Polarity

stages.description: Number of synchronizer flip-flop stages (module parameter STAGES). More stages reduce the probability of metastability propagating to q, at the cost of additional latency (one cycle per stage).
stages.title: Stages

width.description: Bit width of d_async/q. width=1 is the standard single-bit control-signal synchronizer. width>1 replicates independent synchronizer bits in parallel and is only safe for gray-coded or quasi-static multi-bit signals (see assumptions) — it is NOT safe for arbitrary multi-bit data buses.
width.title: Width

use_reset.description: When true, add a reset input (name/polarity from reset_style/reset_polarity) that clears the synchronizer chain. When false (default), the synchronizer has no reset at all: reset_style and reset_polarity are ignored, and the register chain simply powers up in an unknown state and synchronizes from there — the usual choice for synchronizers, since resetting them can itself reintroduce a CDC problem on the reset signal.
use_reset.title: Use Reset

json_schema.title: CdcSynchronizerOptions

snippets.name: Comparator
snippets.description: Parameterizable width comparator (signed/unsigned, selectable relational outputs).

NamingOptions.description:
Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

convention.description: Identifier case convention for ports and internal signals. 'snake' keeps canonical lower_snake_case names; 'camel' converts to lowerCamelCase.
convention.title: Convention

prefix.description: Literal string prepended to every rendered signal/port name (for example 'i_'/'o_' port-prefix styles). Empty for no prefix.
prefix.title: Prefix

suffix.description: Literal string appended to every rendered signal/port name. Empty for no suffix. The active-low '_n' suffix is applied automatically and is independent of this option.
suffix.title: Suffix

NamingOptions.title: NamingOptions

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the comparator snippet.

Purely combinational: extends :class:`CommonOptions` only (no reset/clock
fields per IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §5 WP-05 common requirements).

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

width.description: Bit width of both comparator inputs (module parameter WIDTH).
width.title: Width

signed_compare.description: When true, 'a' and 'b' are declared signed (two's-complement) and the relational operators compare signed values. When false, they are compared as unsigned vectors.
signed_compare.title: Signed Compare

outputs.description: Which relational outputs to emit, at least one of: 'eq' (a==b), 'ne' (a!=b), 'lt' (a<b), 'le' (a<=b), 'gt' (a>b), 'ge' (a>=b). Each selected operator gets its own 1-bit output port. Order does not matter — outputs are always emitted in canonical order (eq, ne, lt, le, gt, ge) so the config hash and generated code are independent of the order they were requested in.
outputs.title: Outputs

json_schema.title: ComparatorOptions

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the counter snippet.

Extends :class:`ClockedOptions` (language, reset, wrapper, comments, naming)
with the counter-specific fields below.

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

reset_style.description: Reset timing. 'sync' samples reset on the clock edge; 'async' adds the reset edge to the sensitivity list for immediate reset.
reset_style.title: Reset Style

reset_polarity.description: Reset assertion level. 'active_low' resets when the reset input is 0 (named rst_n); 'active_high' resets when it is 1 (named rst).
reset_polarity.title: Reset Polarity

width.description: Counter width in bits. The count output is WIDTH bits wide.
width.title: Width

direction.description: Count direction. 'up' increments, 'down' decrements, 'updown' adds an up_dn input (1 = count up, 0 = count down).
direction.title: Direction

enable.description: Add an 'en' input that gates counting; when low, the count holds.
enable.title: Enable

wrap.description: Boundary behavior. 'overflow' wraps modulo 2^WIDTH; 'saturate' stops at the maximum (up) or minimum (down) value.
wrap.title: Wrap

reset_value.description: Value loaded into the counter on reset. Must be < 2^width.
reset_value.title: Reset Value

json_schema.title: CounterOptions

Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

convention.description: Identifier case convention for ports and internal signals. 'snake' keeps canonical lower_snake_case names; 'camel' converts to lowerCamelCase.

suffix.title: Suffix

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the decoder snippet.

Extends :class:`CommonOptions` (language, wrapper, comments, naming) — a
decoder is purely combinational and has no clock or reset.

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

num_outputs.description: Number of one-hot outputs (dout is this many bits wide). The select input width is automatically clog2(num_outputs).
num_outputs.title: Num Outputs

enable.description: Add an 'en' input. When low, all outputs are forced to their disabled state (all-zero for active_high, all-one for active_low) regardless of sel.
enable.title: Enable

output_polarity.description: Output assertion level. 'active_high' asserts the selected output as 1 (others 0); 'active_low' asserts the selected output as 0 (others 1).
output_polarity.title: Output Polarity

json_schema.title: DecoderOptions

Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the demux snippet.

Extends :class:`CommonOptions` directly (language, wrapper, comments,
naming) — this snippet is purely combinational, so it must NOT extend
:class:`ClockedOptions` (no clock, no reset).

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

num_outputs.description: Number of demultiplexed outputs (out0..out{N-1}). Need not be a power of two; unmapped select values leave every output at zero.
num_outputs.title: Num Outputs

width.description: Data width in bits. din and every output are WIDTH bits wide.
width.title: Width

json_schema.title: DemuxOptions

NamingOptions.description:
Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

convention.description: Identifier case convention for ports and internal signals. 'snake' keeps canonical lower_snake_case names; 'camel' converts to lowerCamelCase.
convention.title: Convention

prefix.description: Literal string prepended to every rendered signal/port name (for example 'i_'/'o_' port-prefix styles). Empty for no prefix.

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the encoder snippet.

Purely combinational: extends :class:`CommonOptions` directly (no reset/
clock fields).

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

kind.description: Encoding scheme. 'priority' resolves multiple set bits by priority (highest index wins); 'onehot' expects exactly one bit set and decodes its index directly.
kind.title: Kind

num_inputs.description: Number of input bits (din width). Output width is clog2(num_inputs).
num_inputs.title: Num Inputs

valid_output.description: Add a 'valid' output that is high when dout reflects a real encoded input (at least one din bit set for 'priority'; exactly one for 'onehot').
valid_output.title: Valid Output

json_schema.title: EncoderOptions

snippets.name: Finite State Machine
snippets.description: State machine skeleton (enum states, Moore/Mealy, binary/onehot/gray encoding) with TODO transition logic.

NamingOptions.description:
Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

convention.description: Identifier case convention for ports and internal signals. 'snake' keeps canonical lower_snake_case names; 'camel' converts to lowerCamelCase.
convention.title: Convention

prefix.description: Literal string prepended to every rendered signal/port name (for example 'i_'/'o_' port-prefix styles). Empty for no prefix.
prefix.title: Prefix

suffix.description: Literal string appended to every rendered signal/port name. Empty for no suffix. The active-low '_n' suffix is applied automatically and is independent of this option.
suffix.title: Suffix

NamingOptions.title: NamingOptions

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the FSM snippet.

Extends :class:`ClockedOptions` (language, reset, wrapper, comments, naming)
with the FSM-specific fields below. The state list is the only non-scalar
option in the whole snippet catalog; the frontend renders it as a tag/chips
input (IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §7 risk "FSM options UX").

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

reset_style.description: Reset timing. 'sync' samples reset on the clock edge; 'async' adds the reset edge to the sensitivity list for immediate reset.
reset_style.title: Reset Style

reset_polarity.description: Reset assertion level. 'active_low' resets when the reset input is 0 (named rst_n); 'active_high' resets when it is 1 (named rst).
reset_polarity.title: Reset Polarity

states.description: State names, each a valid lower_snake_case identifier, unique. 2-16 states. Become enum members (SV) or localparams (Verilog).
states.title: States

encoding.description: State encoding. 'binary' is area-efficient (ceil(log2 N) bits); 'onehot' uses one bit per state for fast, cheap decode (FPGA friendly); 'gray' changes one bit per adjacent transition, reducing switching glitches and easing CDC of the state vector.
encoding.title: Encoding

machine.description: Machine type. 'moore' outputs depend on the current state only (registered, glitch-free); 'mealy' outputs depend on state and inputs (fewer states, but combinational input-to-output paths).
machine.title: Machine

reset_state.description: State entered on reset. Must be one of 'states'. Defaults to the first state in the list when omitted.
reset_state.title: Reset State

outputs.description: Output port names (0-8), each a valid lower_snake_case identifier, unique. Each becomes a 1-bit output with a TODO skeleton in the output logic. Empty for a state-only FSM.
outputs.title: Outputs

json_schema.title: FsmOptions

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the multiplexer snippet.

Purely combinational: extends :class:`CommonOptions` only (no reset/clock
fields per IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §5 WP-05 common requirements).

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

num_inputs.description: Number of data inputs. Emitted as numbered ports in0..in{N-1} (the IR has no array-valued ports in v0.1). This is a structural choice: it changes the port list itself, not a runtime parameter.
num_inputs.title: Num Inputs

width.description: Bit width of each data input and the output (module parameter WIDTH).
width.title: Width

impl.description: Select-logic implementation. 'case' emits an always_comb/always block with a case statement on sel; 'ternary' emits a single continuous assignment built from a nested ternary chain.
impl.title: Impl

json_schema.title: MuxOptions

Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

convention.description: Identifier case convention for ports and internal signals. 'snake' keeps canonical lower_snake_case names; 'camel' converts to lowerCamelCase.
convention.title: Convention

prefix.description: Literal string prepended to every rendered signal/port name (for example 'i_'/'o_' port-prefix styles). Empty for no prefix.

suffix.title: Suffix

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the register snippet.

Extends :class:`ClockedOptions` (language, reset, wrapper, comments,
naming) with the register-specific fields below.

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

reset_style.description: Reset timing. 'sync' samples reset on the clock edge; 'async' adds the reset edge to the sensitivity list for immediate reset.
reset_style.title: Reset Style

reset_polarity.description: Reset assertion level. 'active_low' resets when the reset input is 0 (named rst_n); 'active_high' resets when it is 1 (named rst).
reset_polarity.title: Reset Polarity

width.description: Register width in bits. Both d and q are WIDTH bits wide.
width.title: Width

enable.description: Add an 'en' input that gates loading; when low, the register holds its value.
enable.title: Enable

reset_value.description: Value loaded into the register on reset. Must be < 2^width.
reset_value.title: Reset Value

clear_input.description: Add a synchronous 'clr' input. When asserted, the register loads reset_value on the next clock edge regardless of 'en' (clear beats enable).
clear_input.title: Clear Input

json_schema.title: RegisterOptions

snippets.description: Parameterizable serial-in shift register (left/right, parallel load, serial-out-only mode).

Identifier naming style applied to ports/signals at render time.

Mirrors the render-engine :class:`~semicraft_core.render.style.StyleOptions`
naming knobs; :func:`semicraft_core.generate.generate` translates these into
that type. ``convention`` selects the identifier case; ``prefix``/``suffix``
wrap every rendered name (e.g. ``prefix="i_"`` for input-port style).

json_schema.description:
Configuration for the shift-register snippet.

Extends :class:`ClockedOptions` (language, reset, wrapper, comments,
naming) with the shift-register-specific fields below.

language.description: Output HDL. 'sv' emits SystemVerilog (logic, always_ff/comb); 'verilog' emits Verilog-2001 (inferred reg/wire, always @).
language.title: Language

include_wrapper.description: When true, emit a complete module with port list. When false, emit fragment mode: just the processes/assigns plus a comment block listing the declarations the enclosing module must provide.
include_wrapper.title: Include Wrapper

comment_verbosity.description: Explanatory comment level in the generated code. 'none' strips all comments (including port docs); 'normal' keeps standard comments; 'verbose' adds extra intent commentary.
comment_verbosity.title: Comment Verbosity

reset_style.description: Reset timing. 'sync' samples reset on the clock edge; 'async' adds the reset edge to the sensitivity list for immediate reset.
reset_style.title: Reset Style

reset_polarity.description: Reset assertion level. 'active_low' resets when the reset input is 0 (named rst_n); 'active_high' resets when it is 1 (named rst).
reset_polarity.title: Reset Polarity

depth.description: Number of bits in the shift register. Emitted as parameter DEPTH.
depth.title: Depth

direction.description: Shift direction. 'right' shifts toward the LSB (q <= {si, q[DEPTH-1:1]}); 'left' shifts toward the MSB (q <= {q[DEPTH-2:0], si}).
direction.title: Direction

parallel_load.description: Add a 'load' input and a 'd[DEPTH-1:0]' input. When 'load' is high the register loads 'd' instead of shifting (load beats shift).
parallel_load.title: Parallel Load

serial_out_only.description: When true, expose only the serial output 'so' (no parallel 'q[DEPTH-1:0]' output port). When false, expose both 'q' and 'so'.
serial_out_only.title: Serial Out Only

enable.description: Add an 'en' input that gates shifting/loading; when low the register holds.
enable.title: Enable

json_schema.title: ShiftRegisterOptions
